title: Hawái
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Hawaii

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Hawaii

You can apply for Medicaid in Hawaii by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

Shop Health Insurance Marketplace® in Hawaii

If your small business is located in Hawaii, you can visit the Hawaii Department of Labor and Industrial Relations (DLIR) website for more information on the SHOP program.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Hawaii

If your employer offers health coverage in Hawaii, you should contact your employer or visit the Hawaii Department of Labor and Industrial Relations (DLIR) website for more information on the SHOP program.

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Hawaii

CHIP in Hawaii

Quest Hawaii covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Quest Hawaii right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Quest Hawaii.

Consumer Assistance in Hawaii

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Hawaii

You can apply for Medicaid in Hawaii by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

Shop Health Insurance Marketplace® in Hawaii

If your small business is located in Hawaii, you can visit the Hawaii Department of Labor and Industrial Relations (DLIR) website for more information on the SHOP program.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Hawaii

If your employer offers health coverage in Hawaii, you should contact your employer or visit the Hawaii Department of Labor and Industrial Relations (DLIR) website for more information on the SHOP program.

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Hawaii

CHIP in Hawaii

Quest Hawaii covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Quest Hawaii right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Quest Hawaii.
